leads.title: Keel Infrastructure closes $458m in convertible senior notes for AI data center developments
leads.summary: The company will expand and accelerate its data center developments with $445.4m in net proceeds

leads.title: Vertiv launches 'Extreme' rack for AI and HPC data centers
leads.summary: Vendor takes extreme measures to meet demands of AI servers

leads.title: Green Horizon targets 36MW data center in Stavanger, Norway
leads.summary: As Fossefall secures permission to expand in Fyresdal

leads.title: DCD>Studio: How grid-interactive power is shaping data center energy strategies, with Steph Veigel, Eaton
leads.summary: Emma Strutton speaks with Steph Veigel of Eaton on the evolving role of data centers in the energy transition, exploring grid interactivity, energy resilience, and strategies to support renewable integration.

leads.title: Malaysia's Tanco signs MoU with China Mobile International for potential 50MW data center in Port Dickson
leads.summary: The pair have two years to sign a definitive agreement

leads.title: Sponsored: In the data center race, power infrastructure decisions must come first
leads.summary: As data centers operate more like grid-scale systems, distribution architecture becomes a strategic design decision that shapes reliability, scalability, and operational certainty

leads.title: Sponsored: A bridge to resilience
leads.summary: How data centers facing multi-year waits for grid power can use microgrids as prime power from day one – turning them into permanent N+ resiliency assets once utility supply arrives

leads.title: Australia’s Monash University launches supercomputer at CDC data center
leads.summary: Nvidia system launches in CDC's Brooklyn facility outside Melbourne
